files.description: Added project type detection (DJANGO/PYTHON_PACKAGE/UNKNOWN), 4 generic Python extractors (extract_setup_py, extract_package_readme, extract_cross_package_deps, extract_repo_readme_mapping), --force flag, project-type-aware gap detection, extractor orchestration by project type
Added --force flag to overwrite existing reconciliation artifacts
Overwritten with 22 evidence anchors (from 0). 4 evidence types: SETUP_PY (8), CROSS_PACKAGE_DEP (8), PACKAGE_README (3), REPO_README_MAP (3)
Re-seeded with evidence-aware state: 11 EVIDENCE_ATTACHED, 4 PROPOSED, 13 obligations, promotion gate BLOCKED, review_mode UNCLASSIFIED
Re-seeded with 13 obligations (4 MERGE_REVIEW, 4 EVIDENCE_GAP, 5 AUTHORITY_REVIEW) — down from 24
Re-seeded with 14 seed events (1 initialization + 13 obligation_created)
